evals.name: ui-agent-tab
evals.prompt: I just finished the agent tab session chat feature. Add an E2E validation section to docs/specs/agent-tab-session-chat-prd.md.
evals.expected_output: The spec file gains a '## E2E Validation' section with concrete UI scenarios, a browser-drive block naming playwright-cli OR claude-in-chrome MCP, conditional worktree+seed, scoped unit tests, launch preview, and artifacts under validation/. No THREAD log, no sign-off gate, no teardown.

evals.name: backend-scheduler
evals.expected_output: A '## E2E Validation' section detecting a backend/CLI surface: CLI-driven steps (pnpm aihub:dev scheduler ...), hot-reload assertion, scoped gateway tests. No browser block (no UI surface). Concrete assertions.

evals.name: nopath-shaping
evals.prompt: write the validation section for the project shaping repo guard PRD I just implemented
evals.expected_output: Skill resolves the target by searching docs/prp + docs/specs (project-shaping-repo-prd.md), then appends a '## E2E Validation' section. Backend move-guard assertions (block move to shaping when repo unset; re-fetch to confirm) plus any project-creation UI/CLI steps.
